```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;

    while (value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        writer.write(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }

    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    writer.write(&byte, 1);
    return ++written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    T value = 0;
    int shift { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte = 0;

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        reader.read(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while (byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    // Create a buffer to hold the encoded data
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor_write(buffer, hexi::init_empty);

    // Create a binary_stream_writer for the adaptor
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor_write);

    // Encode the value
    encode_varint(writer, original_value);

    // Create a new buffer_adaptor for the same buffer to read from the beginning
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor_read(buffer, hexi::init_empty);

    // Create a binary_stream_reader for the adaptor
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor_read);

    // Decode the value
    T decoded_value = decode_varint(reader);

    // Compare
    return original_value == decoded_value;
}
```
